label: Population density
subtitle: Number of people resident per square kilometre
description: This indicator shows the number of usual residents per square kilometre, calculated based on total land area excluding inland water, in the United Kingdom, for 1991 to 2024.
caveats:
[Standard Area Measurements (December 2024) in the UK](https://geoportal.statistics.gov.uk/datasets/ons::standard-area-measurements-for-the-local-authority-districts-december-2024-in-the-uk/about) was used to calculate population density by dividing the total population by the area in square kilometres.

Population estimates in Explore Local Statistics (ELS) are informed by those available on Nomis at the time of publication on ELS.
